name: create_user
description: Create a new user in a specific Auth0 database connection. You must specify the connection name and either an email/password combination or a phone number. Optional metadata fields can be set at creation time.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The user's password. Must meet the connection's password policy requirements.

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: The name of the database connection to create the user in.

parameters.name: email_verified
parameters.description: Whether the email is pre-verified. Default is false.

parameters.name: user_metadata
parameters.description: Custom metadata visible to the user (e.g., preferences).

parameters.name: app_metadata
parameters.description: Custom metadata not visible to the user (e.g., internal flags).
